title: Drift Circuit 2: Championship
tagline: Drift a five-track season against a rival field.
blurb: Drift Circuit grown up: 5 themed circuits, a points-scoring championship, an AI field with rubber-banding, selectable cars, and nitro boost.
whatsNew: 5 themed circuits with distinct layouts (Speedway, Switchback, Coil, Dunes, Tempest)
Championship season: race a 5-round series for points and the title
AI rival field (3/5/7 cars) with three difficulty tiers and mild rubber-banding
Car selection with speed/grip/accel trade-offs, plus unlockable machines
Nitro boost meter, refilled by drifting and clean laps
Per-track best laps and ghosts saved separately under a new save key
